metaTitle: Mouse Extermination NYC | Mouse Control & Removal | The Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional mouse control in NYC. Trapping, baiting, exclusion. Free inspection. Same-day available. Licensed exterminators. 30-day guarantee. Call now.
h1: Mouse Extermination in NYC — Eliminated to the Last One
heroParagraph: House mice are the most common rodent in NYC apartments, restaurants, and offices. They squeeze through gaps the size of a dime, reproduce at alarming speed — a pair can produce 60 offspring in a year — and contaminate food and surfaces with droppings and urine. Our mouse control programs combine tamper-resistant bait stations, precision snap trap placement, and thorough exclusion work to eliminate current infestations and seal every entry point permanently.

faqs.q: How do mice get into my NYC apartment?
faqs.a: Through gaps as small as 1/4 inch — around pipes, under doors, through gaps in baseboards, along utility conduits, and through damaged wall areas. In multi-unit buildings, mice travel freely through shared walls. Exclusion is the only permanent fix.

faqs.q: How much does mouse extermination cost?
faqs.a: Mouse control starts at $150–$400 for a standard apartment, including trapping, baiting, and basic exclusion. Comprehensive rodent-proofing for complete structural exclusion is quoted separately after inspection.
